name: send_message
description: Send a message to another agent in this session tree (your parent, a sub-agent you spawned, or a sibling/team member). The message is delivered durably to the recipient's inbox: a running recipient sees it at its next safe point; an idle one is woken to handle it. Use the recipient's session id (from spawn results, receipts, or your task briefing), a handle you own, or "parent".

to.description: Recipient: "parent", a session id inside this tree, or a handle returned by your own spawn_agent call.
